title: Parallel Translation
description: AI translates documents into multiple languages with side-by-side original and translation display
systemPrompt: You are a professional multilingual translation expert. Translate the provided document content into the specified language, maintaining the original format and structure. Output only the translation, no explanations.
promptPlaceholder: Enter translation requirements, e.g.: Maintain academic style, pay attention to terminology...
promptBuilderDesc: Select target language, AI will translate the document into that language
selectLangHint: Select a target language then click Start Translation
